assertion_results.text: outputs/api-claim-verification.md contains the detected claim text (e.g., 'PR reviews cannot be updated' or 'does not support modifying a submitted review')
assertion_results.evidence: File contains both phrases: line 8 'PR reviews cannot be updated after initial submission' and line 9 'The GitHub API does not support modifying a submitted review'

assertion_results.text: outputs/api-claim-verification.md contains a reference to the GitHub REST API endpoint PUT /repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls/{pull_number}/reviews/{review_id} or equivalent evidence that the claim is incorrect
assertion_results.evidence: File contains on line 18: 'PUT /repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls/{pull_number}/reviews/{review_id}' and states 'Result: INCORRECT' on line 13, with explanation that the endpoint allows updating the body of a previously submitted review

assertion_results.text: outputs/api-claim-verification.md contains suggested corrected language for the Requirement
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 29-37 contain '## Suggested Corrected Language' section with corrected requirement: 'Update existing PR reviews when re-running evals on the same PR, or create a new review if none exists' and corrected note: 'Use the GitHub REST API PUT /repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls/{pull_number}/reviews/{review_id} endpoint to update an existing review, or POST to create a new one'

assertion_results.text: outputs/preview.md contains the heading '## Feature Overview'
outputs/preview.md does NOT contain the heading '## Background and Strategic Fit'
assertion_results.evidence: The file preview.md was read in full (25 lines). It contains only '## Feature Overview' and '## Requirements' headings. No '## Background and Strategic Fit' heading is present.
